android.widget.TextView.text: Flavor shots are unsweetened and sugar free.
android.widget.TextView.heading: false

android.widget.TextView.text:
Our Box O' Joe® is a great addition to any gathering; it's the one thing everyone can agree on. America's Favorite Coffee is the perfect way to get a group running.
Be a real hero and pick up some Donuts and Munchkins® while you're at it.
Contains ten 10oz servings which is equivalent to ten small cups of Dunkin' coffee.
android.widget.TextView.heading: false
